statement: This record remains negative evidence on build 26100: the repo did not produce enough supporting proof to promote it into a normal actionable surface.
gating_reason: Archived audit trail only. Keep this out of the normal tweak surface.

links.title: Local Microsoft ICM.admx mapping for DisableWindowsUpdateAccess
links.summary: The local ADMX file maps DisableWindowsUpdateAccess with enabledValue 1 and disabledValue 0.

links.title: Local Microsoft WindowsUpdate.admx mapping
links.summary: The local ADMX file documents NoAutoUpdate under the AU policy key and shows the official Enable/Disable mapping for Configure Automatic Updates.

links.title: Local Microsoft WindowsUpdate.adml help text
links.summary: The local ADML help text explains DisableWindowsUpdateAccess, NoAutoUpdate, and the driver-exclusion policy, and clarifies that NoAutoUpdate = 1 prohibits Windows from searching for updates.

links.title: Current app implementation
links.summary: The provider writes DisableWindowsUpdateAccess = 1, NoAutoUpdate = 1, and three pause timestamp values under the UX settings path.
